headlines.title: Thirsty England fans could down an extra 6 million pints during semifinal clash
headlines.description: The World Cup has provided a welcome boost to England’s pubs with millions more pints sold. But the industry is ailing and many are facing closure.

headlines.title: How to Save on Medical Bills and Handle Unexpected Costs
headlines.description: Navigating medical bills can be stressful and confusing so NBC’s Christine Romans joins TODAY with ways to save and what to do if your bill comes in higher than expected, including requesting an itemized bill and filing an appeal.

headlines.title: How to Stay Cool and Save Money on Summer Energy Bills
headlines.description: NBC’s Christine Romans joins TODAY to walk through simple steps you can take to cut energy bills down during the scorching hot summer.

headlines.title: How to Choose the Right Air Conditioning Unit Amid Record Heat
headlines.description: The summer heat is on and choosing the right air conditioner can claim a big chunk of your utility bill. Reporting for TODAY, NBC’s Vicky Nguyen meets with experts at Consumer Reports to learn how to stay cool without wasting money.

headlines.title: 12 states file lawsuit to block $110 billion Paramount-Warner Bros. merger
headlines.description: Twelve state attorneys general filed a lawsuit challenging Paramount Skydance’s $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery. NBC News' Allie Canal breaks down how the lawsuit says consumers could be impacted and what it could mean for Paramount.

headlines.title: How grocery prices have changed since Trump took office
headlines.description: Learn where grocery prices stand during the Trump administration. See how inflation is affecting the cost of eggs, bread, chicken, ground beef and more.

headlines.title: Oil continues rising despite Trump’s dropping Hormuz ‘reimbursement fee’
headlines.description: The price of international Brent crude oil has risen more than 15% since Sunday to levels not seen since June.

headlines.title: Inflation eased to 3.5% in June, just before energy prices spiked again
headlines.description: Inflation eased to 3.5% in June, thanks to energy prices that fell after the U.S. and Iran signed a memorandum of understanding in a bid to end the ongoing war.

headlines.title: Oil surges more than 9% after Trump reimposes Iran blockade
headlines.description: Trump said the U.S. “will be reimbursed” for helping ships through the Strait of Hormuz. Crude oil hit its highest price in about a month.

headlines.title: Gas cost calculator: How much have higher gas prices cost you?
headlines.description: Americans have spent an estimated $33 billion more in gas since the Iran war started. According to an NBC News analysis, drivers who fill up twice a month paid anywhere from $20 to $300 more for gas.

headlines.title: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Levi’s CEO Michelle Gass hopes to ring up more sales to women
headlines.description: Levi’s has a potential source of untapped growth: sales to women, who barely make up 40% of company receipts, CEO Michelle Gass said.
